_comment: Site-wide configuration. Edit here; all pages read this at runtime.
_version_comment: format_version governs JSON file/record structure. model_version governs scoring weights and archetype assignment. Both are frozen on each run record at save time. Old runs are never re-scored. Bump model_version only via the admin model-snapshot procedure (D1 + static file + git tag).

protocol._comment: min_runs completions within window_days unlocks trendline analytics and LLM chat. ics_interval_days is the spacing between suggested retake dates in the .ics download.

tiers.label: Trendline
tiers.description: Archetype trend chart + baseline comment unlocked.

sharing._comment: User must have at least min_runs_to_share completed runs before they can generate a share URL. Shared URLs are point-in-time snapshots (name, most recent 3 archetypes + summary scores + datestamps). To update, ask the person for a new URL.

personal_circle._comment: Personal Circle holds up to max_slots intimate contacts whose personality arcs you track alongside your own. Adding a shared result to your circle requires a subscription. Generating and receiving share URLs is free. Each slot has update (paste new URL) and drop actions.

calibration._comment: Questions in 'calibrating' status are included in the test pool and responses are anonymously recorded. After min_samples responses, a response_weight can be assigned via the admin interface. Questions stay in calibrating status until manually promoted to live by an admin.

sync._comment: max_active_runs: own runs kept in the active localStorage window when a sync folder is set up. Should be >= the highest analytics tier run threshold (currently 10) so analytics always works from localStorage alone. archive_batch_size: evicted runs are buffered until this count is reached, then written as one closed archive file. Archive files are immutable once written.

sampling._comment: target_count: questions served per run. calibration_slots: reserved for questions in 'calibrating' status (data collection). recency_slots: reserved for recently-promoted live questions (within recency_window_days) to build response history. max_overlap_pct: upper bound on how many questions may repeat from the user's previous run (0–100). Stratified balance across 4 discrimination types (ev, virtue_conseq, virtue_deon, conseq_deon) fills remaining slots.
